question_html:
Write down the appropriate preposition for the following sentences:

(a) She has recovered ____ her illness.

(b) His sympathy ____ the poor is praiseworthy.

(c) I was quite unaware _____ the problem.

(d) They were surprised ____ the news.

(e) He is completely void _____ charm so far as I can see.
solution_html:
(a) from (b) for (c) of (d) at (e) of

Marks Distribution:

For writing the appropriate prepositions; (0.5×5)=2.5 marks.

question_html:
Complete the following sentences:

(a) The boy was so lazy that ______.

(b) I was reading a novel when ______.

(c) Had you helped me, ______.

(d) We cannot achieve success unless ______.

(e) She spoke so softly ______.
solution_html:
(a) he could not finish his homework on time/he failed all his examinations.

(b) the lights suddenly went out/she called.

(c) I could/would/might have completed the task easily

(d) we work hard with determination

(e) that nobody in the room could hear her clearly

Marks Distributions:

For completing the sentences correctly; (0.5×5)=2.5 marks.

[N.B: Any kind of sentence that is correct, will also get allocated marks.]

question_html: Write a paragraph on “The Gig Economy and Youth Employment”.
solution_html:
The Gig Economy and Youth Employment

The gig economy refers to a labor market based on short-term contracts, freelance work, and digital platforms instead of permanent jobs. In today’s world, it has created new opportunities for youth who seek flexibility and independence. Many young people now work as freelancers, ride-sharing drivers, online tutors, or delivery partners. This system allows them to earn money, gain experience, and balance education with work. However, the gig economy also has challenges, such as lack of job security, irregular income, and absence of social benefits. In Bangladesh, it is expanding rapidly with the growth of technology and internet access. If supported with proper policies, the gig economy can reduce unemployment and empower youth in the modern workforce.

 

Marks Distribution:

For writing the title “The Gig Economy and Youth Employment” → 0.5 mark

For defining the gig economy → 01 mark

For explaining its benefits for youth (flexibility, income, experience) → 1.5 marks

For mentioning its challenges (insecurity, irregular income, no benefits) → 01 mark

For giving a conclusion → 01 mark

[Instructions:

* Students must write it within one single para. If it becomes more than one para, 50% marks have to be deducted from the obtained marks.

* 0.5 mark will be deducted for one or two grammar or spelling mistakes, 01 mark for three or more grammar or spelling mistakes.]
